courseTitle: Track Studio I: Methods and Media
title: Ethical Choice Microgame
genericDescription: Design ethical tension without a simple correct answer; connect values to mechanics; avoid false neutrality.
specificDescription: Build a game around a dilemma involving cultural interpretation, authenticity, authorship, automation, care, surveillance, labor, or audience participation. Choices must alter systems, not only ending text.
gradingRubric: 30 pts ethical complexity; 20 pts mechanical consequence; 20 pts track framing; 15 pts clarity and respect; 15 pts playtest evidence.
